captures.transport_protocol: Streaming (SSE/NDJSON) over /rest/app-chat/conversations[/{id}/response-node]. REST JSON for rate-limits/files/share.
captures.success_response_wire_sample: Body not byte-readable via Claude-in-Chrome taint-guard. New chat POSTs /rest/app-chat/conversations then streams tokens from .../response-node; client renders into div.relative.response-content-markdown. Final assistant text observed: '안녕하세요, 반가워요! 😊' (with a '생각 노트'/thought-note section). Raw frames require CDP/HAR.
captures.frame_separator: Per-token streaming frames over response-node (newline-delimited JSON / SSE data lines presumed); exact separator needs CDP/HAR.
captures.dom_render_structure: Next.js app (next-route-announcer; no #__next id exposed but Next confirmed). Container: main.h-full.flex-grow. User turn = div.message-bubble.relative; assistant turn = div.relative.response-content-markdown (rendered markdown). Input editor = div.tiptap.ProseMirror (TipTap). Thought/'생각 노트' collapsible above answer.
captures.framework: Next.js + React; TipTap (ProseMirror) rich-text input. Tailwind utility classes.
captures.console_errors: Not separately polled; grok.com/monitoring (Sentry) POST returned 503 (telemetry only, non-functional). Chat REST calls succeeded; response rendered.

notes: etap-BYPASSED clean baseline. NO age-gate modal appeared this session (already cleared / logged-in account). Chat via /rest/app-chat/conversations + /response-node streaming. Response rendered normally. Endpoints recovered via performance resource entries. Wire bytes taint-guarded -> CDP/HAR for raw stream.
